Method

WPEPlatformViewget_accessible

Declaration [src] 

WPEViewAccessible*
wpe_view_get_accessible (
  WPEView* view
)

Description [src]

Get the WPEViewAccessible of view.

Return value

Type: WPEViewAccessible

A WPEViewAccessible or NULL.

The data is owned by the instance.
The return value can be NULL.
